title: Information about the 2025-2026 Academic Year Registration Renewal Period
content:
Announcements

Details

Information about the 2025-2026 Academic Year Registration Renewal Period

Dear Students,

The advance payment increase rate for the 2025-2026 Academic Year Registration Renewal has been set at 50%, which is below the twelve-month average increase rate of the Turkish Statistical Institute's Consumer Price Index (CPI). The payment system will become active on 21.04.2025.

Registration renewals can be paid by credit card either in full or through a nine-month instalment plan subject to a 30% interest rate.

The renewal deadline is 23.05.2025.*

*If the registration renewal period is extended beyond 23.05.2025, all payments made after that date, including those made through instalment plans, will incur a 10% late registration fee based on the total registration amount.. The 30% interest rate difference applied to the nine-month instalment plan will also remain in effect during the renewal extension period. If deemed necessary, the above-mentioned conditions may be revised.

Paylaş
